etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = plant-related action with phonetic 合 (hé)
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(dá, "reply") uses 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") to indicate a broad category of plant-related words, while 合(合) (hé, "combine") provides the phonetic element. This suggests an action related to plants or growth, metaphorically extended to the notion of a 'reply,' akin to the unfolding or coming together of information.
